description:
Advanced source code and text file printing.

WinPrint is a modern source code and text printing app with a cross-platform terminal UI and Windows/macOS GUI.
What's Changed
- feat(tui): enable Terminal.Gui ConfigurationManager in wp by @tig in #224
- fix(brew): drop wp.dbg from wp formula + make the x86_64_linux bottle best-effort by @tig in #226
